title: Package-wide container pin
description: Sidecar schema validating the shape of policies/container.json — the package-wide container pin emitted by core::emitter::emit_container_spec. Plan §S15.18 — formalises the shape so registry tampering, malformed taxonomy `preferred_container` declarations, and arch-mismatch errors fail loudly at emit time. The current bio-default emit path writes `{"image": null}`; non-bio archetypes (clinical_trial, time_series_forecast) declare a non-null pin in their taxonomy YAML.

image.description: Image reference (e.g. `ghcr.io/scripps/scripps-bio-base`) or null to fall through to the host environment. Must not contain `..` path traversal segments — defence-in-depth against a taxonomy that tries to escape its registry namespace.

tag.description: Image tag (semver-like). Pinned to a specific release; emitter resolves `:latest`-style refs to a digest at emit time. Null when the image was given as a digest reference rather than a tag.

digest.description: SHA-256 digest, populated at emit time per ADR 0025. v1 schema accepts an empty string here when the taxonomy declares only image + tag; the emitter rewrites it once digest resolution has run.

arch.description: Architecture allowlist. Defaults to `["amd64"]` per plan §3.6 non-goal #22 ("Not building cross-arch images by default"). Each entry must be one of the supported architectures.

gpu_required.description: True when the image needs GPU passthrough (`--nv` / `--gpus=all`). Cross-checks with the task's `resource_profile.gpu` at composition time.

network.description: Network policy. `bridge` = inherit harness default; `none` = no network (used by the clinical_trial archetype per ADR 0028); `host` = host networking (rare, opt-in for sites that need direct registry/proxy access).
